mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stocks (item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, status) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{spaceId}, #{shelfId}, #{boxId}, #{serialNumber}, #{lotNumber}, #{expirationDate}, 'IN_STOCK')
mapper.select: SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, status, created_at FROM stocks WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, status, created_at FROM stocks WHERE external_id = #{externalId}
SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, status, created_at FROM stocks WHERE box_id = #{boxId}
SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, status, created_at FROM stocks WHERE shelf_id = #{shelfId} AND box_id IS NULL
SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, status, created_at FROM stocks WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND shelf_id IS NULL
SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, status, created_at FROM stocks WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, status, created_at FROM stocks WHERE space_id = #{spaceId}

SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, status, created_at FROM stocks WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND box_id = #{boxId} AND status = 'IN_STOCK' ORDER BY created_at

SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, status, created_at FROM stocks WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND shelf_id = #{shelfId} AND box_id IS NULL AND status = 'IN_STOCK' ORDER BY created_at

SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, status, created_at FROM stocks WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND space_id = #{spaceId} AND shelf_id IS NULL AND status = 'IN_STOCK' ORDER BY created_at

SELECT i.external_id AS item_external_id, i.name AS item_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.box_id = #{boxId} AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK' GROUP BY i.id, i.external_id, i.name

SELECT i.external_id AS item_external_id, i.name AS item_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.shelf_id = #{shelfId} AND s.box_id IS NULL AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK' GROUP BY i.id, i.external_id, i.name

SELECT i.external_id AS item_external_id, i.name AS item_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.space_id = #{spaceId} AND s.shelf_id IS NULL AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK' GROUP BY i.id, i.external_id, i.name
